CRESCENT: I was born in a village seclud: CRESCENT: I was born in a village secluded from society in Miera.
Our land had been ravaged by a demon for: Our land had been ravaged by a demon for many centuries.
When all hope seemed lost for us, a burs: When all hope seemed lost for us, a burst of moonlight shone down from the sky.
Cresselia descended from the heavens and: Cresselia descended from the heavens and warded it off with its immaculate light.
Our tribe became eternally grateful for: Our tribe became eternally grateful for Cresselia and we worshiped it as our deity.
The month in which Cresselia saved us ha: The month in which Cresselia saved us had become sacred. The month of the Crescent Moon.
Our tribe came up with rules in order to: Our tribe came up with rules in order to honor it.
1.) Children cannot be born under the mo: 1.) Children cannot be born under the month of the Crescent Moon. This was the most important rule.
2.) People in our tribe could only mate: 2.) People in our tribe could only mate with our own members, or unless specific permissions were given.
3.) Members who have broken either rule: 3.) Members who have broken either rule shall be exiled, or executed on the council's decision.
My mother had broken the second rule and: My mother had broken the second rule and mated with a man outside of our tribe, and as a result, broke the first rule.
I was a child born underneath the Cresce: I was a child born underneath the Crescent Moon.
As a result of my birth, my older brothe: As a result of my birth, my older brother and mother were ostracized, and I was treated like a monster.
I was branded with the name \"Crescent\": I was branded with the name "Crescent" as a reminder of my forbidden birth.
Hatred and disgust followed me for years: Hatred and disgust followed me for years. Day by day I was reminded of the great sin that was my existence.
My mother pretended I didn't exist, and: My mother pretended I didn't exist, and my brother acted as though he loathed me.
Things got so much worse as I grew older: Things got so much worse as I grew older, and my mother could not afford to feed me.
Out of desperation, I stole bread from a: Out of desperation, I stole bread from a stall and was caught. All the years of hatred caused the village's rage to peak.
My older brother, Mün, who I thought hat: My older brother, Mün, who I thought hated me, protected and pleaded with our Elder for another chance.
The Elder agreed and decided to let our: The Elder agreed and decided to let our God decide for us.
I had put my life in front of Cresselia: I had put my life in front of Cresselia and begged for my life.
But when I reached my hand out for forgi: But when I reached my hand out for forgiveness, Cresselia abandoned me.
First, they executed my mother by behead: First, they executed my mother by beheading.
My brother grabbed me and dragged me int: My brother grabbed me and dragged me into the woods...
I thought he was going to kill me himsel: I thought he was going to kill me himself, but eventually we came to a stream.
Mün told me to run. Take the boat he had: Mün told me to run. Take the boat he had prepared and forget about them.
I pleaded for him to come with me, but h: I pleaded for him to come with me, but he refused.
He unlatched the boat and set me adrift. That was the last time I saw my brother.
I wandered the streets alone until the M: I wandered the streets alone until the Miera Nuclear fallout happened.
I found myself on an evacuation ship, an: I found myself on an evacuation ship, and was promptly evacuated off the region.
CRESCENT: Once I got off the ship, a gro: CRESCENT: Once I got off the ship, a group of soldiers asked me where my parents were.
Obviously I told them they were gone, an: Obviously I told them they were gone, and then they took me to a facility where kids without parents were held.
It was there that I found them. My past: It was there that I found them. My past friends.
